sections.paragraph:
Original: משּׂא

Transliteration: maśśâ'

Phonetic: mas-saw'

BDB Definition:

Massa = "burden"
  1. load, bearing, tribute, burden, lifting (noun masculine)
    1. load, burden
    2. lifting, uplifting, that to which the soul lifts itself up
    3. bearing, carrying
    4. tribute, that which is carried or brought or borne
  2. utterance, oracle, burden (noun masculine)
  3. a son of Ishmael (noun proper masculine)

Origin: from H5375

TWOT entry: 1421d,1421e

Part(s) of speech:
